title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Om Book Shop Capital India

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Om Book Shop Capital India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Om Book Shop Capital India in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Om Book Shop Capital India:
Om Book Shop Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Book Shop Capital India!
